narrative:
Copley Twp D (precinct in Summit County) has 1,019 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.2 percentage points.
